seo.title: GDPR Compliance tools directory
seo.description: A developer-first directory of GDPR Compliance tools and references.

content.intro: A curated directory of infrastructure tools, analytics platforms, and legal resources specifically selected for developers and SaaS founders implementing GDPR-compliant systems in the EU.

entries.name: Plausible Analytics
entries.description: Lightweight and open-source website analytics that does not use cookies and is fully compliant with GDPR, CCPA, and PECR.
pros: Hosted in the EU on European-owned infrastructure

entries.name: Umami
entries.description: Self-hosted, privacy-focused alternative to Google Analytics that provides a simple API and dashboard.

entries.name: Cookiebot
entries.description: Automated cookie consent solution that scans websites to categorize cookies and generate a compliant banner.
pros: Automatic script blocking until consent is given
cons: Banner UI customization is limited on lower tiers

entries.name: Supabase (EU Regions)
entries.description: Open-source Firebase alternative allowing developers to host PostgreSQL databases in specific EU regions like Frankfurt or Ireland.
pros: Data residency control via region selection
cons: Edge functions may route through US if not configured

entries.name: Clerk
entries.description: Authentication and user management provider with built-in features for GDPR compliance, including data deletion workflows.
pros: Automated user data export and deletion APIs
cons: US-based company requires specific DPA signing
Customizing hosted UI components can be restrictive

entries.name: Postmark
entries.description: Transactional email service with strict data retention settings and clear Data Processing Agreements for EU customers.
cons: Strict manual approval process for new accounts

entries.name: Iubenda
entries.description: Attorney-level privacy policy and terms and conditions generator that updates automatically when laws change.
cons: Interface can be overwhelming for simple sites
Pricing is per-policy and can escalate quickly

entries.name: Fathom Analytics
entries.description: Privacy-first analytics that invented the 'privacy-focused' niche, offering EU isolation for data processing.
pros: EU Isolation feature routes EU traffic to EU servers
Handles high traffic spikes without latency

entries.name: GDPR.eu Checklist
entries.description: A practical guide and checklist for small to medium-sized businesses to ensure technical compliance.
pros: Official resource co-funded by the EU

entries.name: Termly
entries.description: Compliance suite providing a cookie consent manager, privacy policy generator, and DSAR request forms.
pros: Integrated Data Subject Access Request (DSAR) forms
cons: Limited CSS customization for the banner
